CVE-2023-37154.title: check_by_ssh in Nagios nagios-plugins 2.4.5 allows arbitrary comm ...
CVE-2023-37154.description: check_by_ssh in Nagios nagios-plugins 2.4.5 allows arbitrary command execution via ProxyCommand, LocalCommand, and PermitLocalCommand with \${IFS}. This has been categorized both as fixed in e8810de, and as intended behavior.
